info.title: URGE v2 API
info.description: Prompt registry and version control API. Manage prompts, versions, render templates, store LLM results, and collaborate via teams.

CollectionItem.description: A collection item with resolved content. Fields vary by item_type.

get.summary: List prompts visible to the authenticated user

200.description: Prompt with active version and counts
List of branches with version counts and HEAD info

get.summary: Get branch details with HEAD content
Get a collection with its items

post.summary: Add an item to a collection

item_id.description: ID of the prompt version or result

delete.summary: Remove an item from a collection

404.description: Item does not belong to this collection
